title: AI FitnessCoach - AI-Powered Fitness Planning App
description: Generated personalized 7-day fitness plans from 180+ profile combinations using an LLM-powered recommendation system.
achievements: Built a fallback pipeline that repaired malformed AI responses and regenerated plans from a curated exercise and meal database.
Reduced core API complexity by 89% (290 to 30 lines) through modular service refactoring.
Improved usability with PDF export, plan regeneration, and audio playback in a responsive dark-mode interface.
